title: DSPM Session Manifest v1
description: Auto-generated technical description of a performance session bundle: timing, channels, and log file references. Written by bridge-server.js (manifest stub at session start, duration filled in at session end). Human-entered context lives in performance-metadata.json (see performance-metadata.schema.json), not here.

schema_version.description: Version of this manifest schema, for future migrations.

session_id.description: Matches the session bundle's directory name, e.g. session_2026-06-18T03-29-46-579Z.

t0.description: Unix epoch seconds marking the start of the session -- the zero point all log timestamps (t, in seconds) are relative to.

duration_sec.description: Total session duration in seconds. Written when the bridge session ends.

offsets_sec.description: Per-source time offset (seconds) to align that source's own clock/start-time with t0. A positive value means the source started that many seconds AFTER t0. e.g. {"norns": 0.0, "field_recorder": 2.4, "video": -1.1}.

channels.description: Per-channel metadata for every control exposed to the phone bridge.

logs.description: Relative paths (within the bundle) to each layer's JSONL log.

media.description: Supplementary media files uploaded post-show via the backend (audio stems, video, line-level, field recording, stills). Each entry is a relative path within the bundle's media/ directory.
